description: A premium scratch card game where the player scratches over a metallic surface to reveal a brand message, product, or prize underneath. Auto-completes with a cinematic reveal once the scratch threshold is reached.

colors.description: Brand color palette for all visuals

primary.description: Main brand color for card frame, overlay tint, and UI accents

accent.description: Highlights, sparkle particles, and progress bar fill

subtitle.description: Subtitle or tagline on splash screen

scratchPrompt.description: Instructional text above the scratch card (e.g., 'Scratch to reveal!')

revealMessage.description: Main message revealed under the scratch surface

prizeText.description: Prize or offer text displayed below the reveal image

encouragement.description: Random encouragement messages shown during scratching

scratchThreshold.description: Percentage of area that must be scratched to trigger the full reveal (0-100)

scratchRadius.description: Radius of each scratch circle in pixels

timerEnabled.description: Whether to show a countdown timer

duration.description: Game duration in seconds (only used if timerEnabled is true)

assets.description: Mapping of brand assets to game roles

revealImage.description: Asset key for the product/brand image revealed under the scratch surface

logo.description: Asset key for brand logo on splash/end screen

overlayStyle.description: Visual style of the scratch overlay surface
